blocks.title: Let's Count!
blocks.body: Counting tells us how many things there are. We say one number for each thing and stop when we've counted them all!

blocks.title: Count your fingers with me!
steps: Touch the next finger and say... 2
Touch the next finger and say... 3
Touch the next finger and say... 4
Touch your little finger and say... 5 🖐️

blocks.question: How many apples? 🍎 🍎 🍎
blocks.hint: Count them out loud: one... two... three...

blocks.question: Count the ducks: 🦆 🦆
blocks.hint: Count each duck: one duck, two ducks...

blocks.question: How many stars? ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐
blocks.hint: Point to each star and count: 1, 2, 3, 4...

blocks.question: How many bananas? 🍌 🍌 🍌
blocks.hint: Touch each banana and count them.

blocks.message: You can count to 5! Amazing work! 🎉
